title: URAファイナルズ参加権獲得！

text_block_list.name: Newscaster
text_block_list.text:
Next, we've got a big announcement for the
upcoming URA Finale!

text_block_list.name: Newscaster
text_block_list.text:
The Twinkle Series's brightest stars will vie for the
ultimate crown on the track of their dreams!

text_block_list.name: Newscaster
text_block_list.text:
And today, we'll be unveiling this year's
magnificent lineup of racers! First up is...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Hey, have you seen what's trending?! It's pretty
much all URA Finale runners!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, it's really getting me pumped for the big
day! Who are you cheering for?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Fan A
text_block_list.text: Hehe, let's say it together! Three, two, one...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
<chrname> has been recognized by
the public for all of her efforts and
achievements...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's been invited to compete in the grand URA
Finale with all of the other star runners!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
<chrname> and I are going to make
our way through the preliminaries and shoot for
the top!
